children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary may establish such regional offices and such other field offices within the United States, its Territories, Commonwealths, and possessions, as the Secretary considers necessary.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary may maintain a regional office in the Republic of the Philippines until .September 30, 2026
